texto: The free market has never worked in agriculture and it never will. The economics of a family farm are very different from a firm's... the demand for food isn't elastic
autor: people don't eat more just because food is cheap. Even if I go out of business this land will keep producing corn.
explicacao: Citação de people don't eat more just because food is cheap. Even if I go out of business this land will keep producing corn. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The free market has never worked in agriculture and it never will. The economics of a family farm…” articula reflexao, michael-pollan, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
